name: life-membrane
description: Organ 3 (membrane) — read-only indexer + explorer over the body harness cell. Life repo; no wallet, no writes.

scripts.test:concern-router: node scripts/sync-concern-router.mjs && node ../../cell/indexer/deriveConcernRouter.test.mjs && node ../../cell/indexer/resolveAuditScope.test.mjs && node test/concernStep0Refresh.test.mjs && node test/concern-scope-per-audit.test.mjs && node test/concern-router.test.mjs
scripts.test:want-board: node scripts/sync-want-board.mjs && node ../../cell/indexer/deriveWantCard.test.mjs && node ../../cell/indexer/wantStore.test.mjs && node ../../cell/indexer/deriveWantBoard.test.mjs && node test/wantBoardFeed.test.mjs && node test/want-board-engine.test.mjs
